name: Flannel Baby Blanket - Cloud Island™ Garden Floral - 4pk: 100% Cotton Textile, 30"x30", Botanical Pattern
description:
The Flannel Baby Blankets from cloud island™ make a great addition to your little one's nursery. From yellow stripes and pink plaid to fun florals, these four baby blankets add a touch of adorable style to their snuggle time. Made from 100% cotton, these printed blankets are soft and gentle on baby's delicate skin, while their flannel construction helps keep your little one warm and comfy from tummy time to stroller rides. Super soft and cozy, these blankets are great for everyday use and machine-washable for easy care and cleaning.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
